parameters.query: SELECT id FROM signals WHERE ticker = '{{ $json.ticker }}' AND session_date = '{{ $json.session_date }}' AND type = 'BUY' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO trades (session_date, signal_id, ticker, buy_price, sell_price, quantity, pnl_amount, pnl_pct, outcome, hit_take_profit, hit_stop_loss, exited_early, feedback_tags, notes)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.session_date }}',
  {{ $json.id ? $json.id : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.ticker }}',
  {{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.buy_price }},
  {{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.sell_price }},
  {{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.quantity }},
  {{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.pnl_amount }},
  {{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.pnl_pct }},
  '{{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.outcome }}',
  {{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.hit_take_profit }},
  {{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.hit_stop_loss }},
  {{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.exited_early }},
  '{{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.feedback_tags.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Calculate P&L').first().json.notes.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)
